title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at LV Prasad Eye Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LV Prasad Eye Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute:
LV Prasad Eye Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute!
